feat.name: Hasty Celebration
feat.text: After even the briefest success, you get caught up in the moment and begin to party, cheering your allies on. You grant all allies within 60 feet a +2 circumstance bonus to attack rolls and damage until the end of your next turn. Unfortunately, while you sing and dance, you aren’t keeping an eye on your surroundings like you should, making you off-guard to all enemies until the end of your next turn as well.

traits.name: Emotion
traits.text: This effect alters a creature’s emotions. Effects with this trait always have the mental trait as well. Creatures with special training or that have mechanical or artificial intelligence are immune to emotion effects.

traits.name: Tanuki
traits.text: A name for both a raccoon-like animal native to Minkai and sapient tanuki who possess shapeshifting powers.

traits.name: Visual
traits.text: A visual effect can affect only creatures that can see it. This applies only to visible parts of the effect, as determined by the GM.

feat.trigger: You critically succeed at an attack roll against an enemy, or an enemy critically fails their saving throw against one of your effects.
